mapper.select: SELECT stock_no AS stockNo, name AS name FROM stocks ORDER BY stock_no;
SELECT name AS name, stock_content AS stockContent FROM STOCKS WHERE stock_no = #{stockNo};

SELECT recent.price - s.prev_point AS priceChange FROM ( SELECT o.order_point AS price FROM TRADE t JOIN ORDERS o ON t.buy_order_no = o.order_no WHERE o.stock_no = 1 ORDER BY t.trade_date DESC LIMIT 1 ) AS recent JOIN STOCKS s ON s.stock_no = #{stockNo};

SELECT COALESCE( ROUND((recent.price - s.prev_point) / NULLIF(s.prev_point, 0) * 100), 0 ) AS changeRate FROM ( SELECT o.order_point AS price FROM TRADE t JOIN ORDERS o ON t.buy_order_no = o.order_no WHERE o.stock_no = 1 ORDER BY t.trade_date DESC LIMIT 1 ) AS recent JOIN STOCKS s ON s.stock_no = #{stockNo};
mapper.update: UPDATE stocks SET publication_balance = publication_balance - #{buyAmount} WHERE stock_no = #{stockNo};
mapper.select: SELECT publication_balance AS "publicationBalance", publication_point AS "publicationPoint" FROM stocks WHERE stock_no = #{stockNo};
